title: asperula cynanchica var. scabridula
intro: Asperula cynanchica var. scabridula, also known as Wood Sorrel or Alpine Wood Sorrel, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat conditions such as digestive issues, inflammation, and colds. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and reducing fever. Asperula cynanchica var. scabridula can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
